package rulecoverage

func NegativeHandlerAndServiceBothLogSameErrorChain() string {
    ruleID := "handler_and_service_both_log_same_error_chain"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Duplicated logging ownership where both service and handler log the same failure."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
